title: thelypteris oxyoura
intro: Thelypteris oxyoura, also known as the Oxyoura fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris oxyoura include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling the leaves in hot water, and it has also been used in herbal medicine to create tinctures and salves for topical application.
